# CareMyTrip

> Travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer

CareMyTrip is a Dehradun-based travel company offering Char Dham Yatra, Kedarnath, Badrinath, Uttarakhand, Kerala, Nepal, Vietnam and custom tour packages.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://www.caremytrip.com/
- packages.html: https://www.caremytrip.com/packages.html
- blogs.html: https://www.caremytrip.com/blogs.html
- about.html: https://www.caremytrip.com/about.html
- contact.html: https://www.caremytrip.com/contact.html

## Contact
- Phone: +91-8527456666, +91-8527458888, +91-9389186101
- Email: info@caremytrip.com, caremytrip@gmail.com
- Address: CMTC House, Khasra No-123KA, Kuthalwali, Near Gorya Homes, Johrigoan, Dehradun, Uttarakhand, 248003

## Package Categories
- Chardham Yatra: Kedarnath, Badrinath, Gangotri & Yamunotri pilgrimages.
- Kumbh Mela: Spiritual mega-gatherings on India's holy rivers.
- Uttarakhand: Himalayan getaways — Auli, Harsil, Valley of Flowers, Kumaon.
- Kerala: Backwaters, beaches and hill stations of God's Own Country.
- Nepal: Kathmandu, Pokhara, Muktinath & Kailash Mansarovar.
- Vietnam: Hanoi, Halong Bay, Sapa, Da Nang & Ho Chi Minh.
- Himachal Pradesh: Shimla, Manali, Dharamsala & Dalhousie.
- Kashmir & Leh Ladakh: Srinagar, Gulmarg, Pahalgam, Leh & Ladakh.
- Darjeeling, Sikkim & North East: Gangtok, Darjeeling, Pelling & North-East India.
- Andaman & Nicobar: Island beaches, coral reefs & honeymoon escapes.
- Karnataka: Coastal & classical Karnataka circuits.
- Tamil Nadu: Temples, hills and heritage of Tamil Nadu.
- Golden Triangle & Rajasthan: Delhi, Agra, Jaipur and beyond.
- Ayodhya & Ramayana Yatra: Ramayana circuit & cultural tours of Awadh.
